title: helichrysum tenue
intro: Helichrysum tenue, also known as the slender helichrysum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is used for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and stress, as well as its ability to improve respiratory and digestive health. Helichrysum tenue can be prepared as an essential oil, which is often used in aromatherapy and herbal remedies, or as a dried herb for teas and infusions.
